javadoc_before:
/** * Whether to decompress the full input or only the first stream * in formats supporting multiple concatenated input streams. * *

This setting applies to the gzip, bzip2 and xz formats only.

* * @param decompressConcatenated * if true, decompress until the end of the * input; if false, stop after the first * stream and leave the input position to point * to the next byte after the stream * @since 1.5 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Whether to decompress the full input or only the first stream * in formats supporting multiple concatenated input streams. * *

This setting applies to the gzip, bzip2 and xz formats only.

* * @param decompressConcatenated * if true, decompress until the end of the * input; if false, stop after the first * stream and leave the input position to point * to the next byte after the stream * @since 1.5 * @deprecated 1.10 use the {@link #CompressorStreamFactory(boolean)} constructor instead */
